---
title: "The Rt. Rev. George Francis Popham Blyth"
---

## The Rt. Rev. George Francis Popham Blyth

**Dates:** (1832–1914)

### Description

Bishop of Jerusalem and the East

### Biography

He  had founded the Jerusalem and the East Mission Fund in 1890.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 25th 1893

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
